docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED MAR-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, PENGFEI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, FANLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, PENGFEI $2,707.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,757.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,707.00 FILED BY CHEN, FANLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, PENGFEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
